text:
The internet forces you to choose
Chaos: Bots and AI fakes running wild
Surveillance: Uploading your Gov ID to every random website
We need a third option: Proof of Personhood without the data trade-off.
That is what I'm building at Sva.
 For more insights-https://t.co/L2g4s0rcJo
author.name: Anurag Singh
